V-M-003.checks: Provisioning and config generation remain compatible with route-aware topology. QR codes are generated 100% client-side using qrcode.react (QRCodeCanvas) with level H error correction — no server fetch, no blob, no CORS issues. Two QR tabs: AmneziaWG (scan QR) and AmneziaVPN (download .conf file).

scenarios.scenario: Provisioning selects correct topology and routing policy
Config rendered successfully for provisioned client
